title: Ukrainian Asparagus Dumplings
description: Tender Ukrainian dumplings filled with asparagus and flavored with citrus, perfect for a light lunch or dinner, evoking nostalgic memories of traditional Ukrainian cuisine
instructions: Combine flour and warm water in a large mixing bowl to form a smooth dough
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth
Let the dough rest for 30 minutes in a warm place
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a thin circle
Steam the asparagus until tender, then chop it into small pieces
Mix the chopped asparagus with lemon zest, salt, and black pepper
Place a tablespoon of the asparagus mixture in the center of each dough circle
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling
Cook the dumplings in boiling water for 5 minutes, then serve with melted butter and grated cheese
